steps.title: Find the common factor
steps.content: The coefficients $19$, $5$, and $8$ have no common factor greater than $1$, but every term has a factor of $x$. So the greatest common factor of the whole expression is $x$.

steps.title: Factor out x
steps.content:
Remove one factor of $x$ from each term. Distributing $x$ back into the parentheses would recreate all three original terms.
$$19x^3+5x^2+8x=x(19x^2+5x+8)$$
The answer is C.
